channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.8%.

item.title: FT UK Politics: NHS hospitals hit key target on waiting times in boost for Streeting

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: 🚨 BREAKING: Wes Streeting resigns
"Where we need vision, we have a vacuum. Where we need direction, we have drift. This was underscored by your speech on Monday. Leaders take responsibility, but too often that has m...
item.description:
🚨 BREAKING: Wes Streeting resigns
"Where we need vision, we have a vacuum. Where we need direction, we have drift. This was underscored by your speech on Monday. Leaders take responsibility, but too often that has m...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting resigns as health secretary and says he has lost confidence in Starmer’s leadership - UK politics live
